page_metadata.biotools__summary: A web server designed to facilitate the functional interpretation of differential expression analysis. It is aimed at allowing experimentalists to "play with" their RNA-Seq data in an easy and at the same time exhaustive fashion within a single tool.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A web server designed to facilitate the functional interpretation of differential expression analysis. It is aimed at allowing experimentalists to "play with" their RNA-Seq data in an easy and at the same time exhaustive fashion within a single tool.
